desc: LayoutSolvePlantroomEquipmentWithPresetCommand — run solver + stage placements into pending_placements.
summary: LayoutSolvePlantroomEquipmentWithPresetCommand — run solver + stage placements into pending_placements.
postcondition: Zero or more pending_placements rows + one solver_runs row.
logictree:
1) Validate resolvers.
2) Build CpSatRoom from room dims.
3) Parse equipment JSON.
4) CpSatPlantroomLayoutSolver.Solve (records solver_runs).
5) For each placement, PendingPlacementsRepository.Enqueue under a new change.
6) Emit run_id + placements_staged + diagnostics.
